diffs.diff:
--- a/test_navmesh.py
+++ b/test_navmesh.py
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+import os, numpy as np

+os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

+import habitat, habitat_sim

+from habitat.config.default import get_config

+from habitat.config import read_write

+

+cfg_path = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/habitat-lab/habitat/config/benchmark/multi_agent/hssd_spot_human_social_nav.yaml"

+config = get_config(cfg_path)

+with read_write(config):

+    config.habitat.simulator.scene_dataset = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/hab3_bench_assets/hab3-hssd/hab3-hssd.scene_dataset_config.json"

+    config.habitat.dataset.scenes_dir = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/scene_datasets"

+    config.habitat.dataset.split = "val"

+

+env = habitat.Env(config=config)

+env.seed(42)

+obs = env.reset()

+

+spot_pos = np.array(env.sim.get_agent(0).state.position)

+print(f"Spot world pos: {spot_pos}")

+

+# Test 1: snap point of a random location on navmesh

+random_navmesh_point = env.sim.pathfinder.get_random_navigable_point()

+print(f"Random navigable point: {random_navmesh_point}")

+

+# Test 2: path from spot to that random point

+path = habitat_sim.ShortestPath()

+path.requested_start = spot_pos

+path.requested_end = random_navmesh_point

+env.sim.pathfinder.find_path(path)

+print(f"Path points to random: {len(path.points)}")

+if len(path.points) > 0:

+    print(f"Distance: {path.geodesic_distance}")

+    for i, pt in enumerate(path.points):

+        print(f"  WP{i}: {pt}")

+

+# Test 3: human position world and snap

+rel = obs['agent_0_other_agent_gps']

+human_pos = spot_pos + np.array([rel[0], 0.0, rel[1]])

+print(f"Human world pos: {human_pos}")

+snapped = env.sim.pathfinder.snap_point(human_pos)

+print(f"Snapped human pos: {snapped}")

+path2 = habitat_sim.ShortestPath()

+path2.requested_start = spot_pos

+path2.requested_end = snapped

+env.sim.pathfinder.find_path(path2)

+print(f"Path points to human: {len(path2.points)}")

+if len(path2.points) > 0:

+    print(f"Distance to human: {path2.geodesic_distance}")

+    for i, pt in enumerate(path2.points):

+        print(f"  WP{i}: {pt}")

+else:

+    print("NO PATH TO HUMAN")

+

+env.close()
